text:
Task 3 (Dark Mode) is complete. All changes committed as `3892a24`. Here's what was done:

**Files modified (3):**

1. **`frontend/tailwind.config.js`** -- Added `darkMode: 'class'` to enable class-based dark mode toggling.

2. **`frontend/src/index.css`** -- Added:
   - `.dark` CSS variable block with full dark palette (dark-900 through dark-300, accent colors, surface variables, shadow)
   - Dark body styles (background, color, grid pattern, scrollbar, selection)
   - Dark mode overrides for ALL component classes: glass-effect, card-dark, btn-primary/secondary/danger, input-dark, badge-success/warning/danger/info/neutral, stat-card, table-dark, sidebar-surface, topbar-surface, brand-mark, nav-item, nav-item-active

3. **`frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx`** -- Added:
   - Theme state with localStorage persistence and `prefers-color-scheme` detection
   - useEffect to toggle `dark` class on `<html>` element
   - Moon/sun toggle button in topbar (before "Live analytics" badge)
   - `dark:` variant classes on all hardcoded colors throughout the component (15+ locations including app shell, sidebar borders, brand text, nav items, accordion groups, collapse button, realtime status box, hamburger menu, workspace header, date display)

**Build:** Passes with zero errors.
**Commit:** `feat: add dark mode with CSS variables and theme toggle`
